description: Search arXiv for research papers by keyword, author, category (e.g. cs.AI), or arXiv id. Returns title, authors, dates, abstract, and links. No credentials needed.

category.description: arXiv category, e.g. cs.AI, cs.CL, stat.ML

ids.description: Comma-separated arXiv ids to fetch directly, e.g. 2402.03300
